title: Migrate keywrap.rs from EVP AES_wrap_key to native wc_AesKeyWrap
description: wolfcrypt/src/keywrap.rs currently uses the OpenSSL compat layer (AES_set_encrypt_key/AES_set_decrypt_key/AES_wrap_key/AES_unwrap_key) gated on wolfssl_openssl_extra. The native wc_AesKeyWrap / wc_AesKeyUnWrap functions do the same thing in one call with no intermediate key schedule struct. After this migration wolfssl_openssl_extra will no longer be needed for keywrap — only ECDSA and AES-CFB will remain.
